meta.anchor: Fairness is strongly linked to retention.

location.heading: Company Culture Video Example: How We Did It at Synthesia

findings.sentence: [Culture is a top factor in job choice.](https://www.linkedin.com/business/talent/blog/talent-acquisition/what-candidates-want-in-2025) - [Growth and development are a core driver of employer attractiveness.](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/psychology/articles/10.3389/fpsyg.2022.858217/full) - [Fairness is strongly linked to retention.](https://doi.org/10.1108/K-01-2022-0119)
findings.title: Link blocks bots (403)
findings.suggested_fix: Link returned 403 to an automated HEAD check. 403 usually means the site is bot-blocking, not that the link is broken. Spot-check in a browser to confirm.

findings.title: Link blocks bots (405)
findings.suggested_fix: www.linkedin.com blocks automated checks (returned 405). Manual spot-check in a browser if you want to be sure.
